case_title: ROHAN DEPUY ET AL VS. DIPEN SHARMA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPUY, ROHAN MALKARY, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHARMA, DIPEN DBA SHARMA FAMILY TRUST $1,223.16 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,298.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DEPUY, ROHAN MALKARY, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHARMA, DIPEN DBA SHARMA FAMILY TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2024 BY CAROLYN GOLD. PLAINTIFF ROHAN DEPUY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DANIEL MALKARY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIPEN SHARMA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.
